DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFFS BENJAMIN KAPLAN AND DOUGLAS MACLELLAN'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY PROPOUNDED TO RICHARD P. MOTZ, INDUVIDUALLY, AND TO RICHARD P. MOTZ, TRUSTEE IS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS MOTZ, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE, MUST PROVIDE FULL AND COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES TO THE REQUESTED DISCOVERY BY JULY 1, 2014. HOWEVER, RICHARD MOTZ AS TRUSTEE MAY RESPOND, IF APPLICABLE, BY INCORPORATION BY REFERENCE TO HIS RESPONSES AS AN INDIVIDUAL. SUCH RESPONSES BY REFERENCE MUST ALSO BE VERIFIED. DEFENDANTS' OBJECTION TO EVIDENCE IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO-TEM: TOM COHEN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-23-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Plaintiffs BENJAMIN ELLIOT KAPLAN, and DOUGLAS C. MACLELLAN, Tel No. (415) 447-8300 appearing as attorneys in pro per;
Atty. CHRISTOPHER D. DENNY, Tel No. (415) 531-8189 appearing for Defendant Richard Motz.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court modified its tentative ruling, and ruled as follows: DEFENDANT RICHARD MOTZ'S Motion For Leave To File Cross Complaint is granted. There is an extremely liberal policy in allowing the filing of a compulsory cross-complaint and plaintiff fails to demonstrate substantial evidence of bad faith. The Court vacated the March 16, 2015 trial date and refered this case back to case management. The Court instructed counsel to report to Dept. 206 this morning to request the calendaring of a settlement conference. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/AJR)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Propounded To Richard P. Motz, Induvidually, And To Richard P. Motz, Trustee
Off Calendar May-30-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DOUGLAS C. MACLELLAN OF THE LAW OFFICES OF KAPLAN & MACLELLAN, TEL. NO. 447-8300 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFFS;
ATTY. CHRIS DENNY, TEL. NO. 531-8189 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS BENJAMIN KAPLAN and DOUGLAS MACLELLAN's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Propounded To Richard P. Motz, Induvidually, And To Richard P. Motz, Trustee is granted. Defendants Motz, individually and as trustee, must provide full and complete verified responses to the requested discovery by July 1, 2014. However, Richard Motz as Trustee may respond, if applicable, by incorporation by reference to his responses as an individual. Such responses by reference must also be verified. Defendants' Objection to Evidence is denied. ORDER SIGNED. Judge Pro-tem: Tom Cohen; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not Reported. =302/JPT
